__comment: Starter dashboard for Building Workspace. The workspace can generate a site/equipment-specific JSON variant from inventory.v1; this default is provisioned by the Observability Pack.
title: S-Tier Building Workspace

targets.query: from(bucket: "utilities") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "bacnet_point") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "present_value")
